properties.name: Mahakali
properties.annual_discharge_or_runoff: 73% of annual surface runoff in Jun-Sep; rainfall 79% in monsoon
properties.monsoon_metric: 73% of surface runoff in four monsoon months
properties.dry_season_note: High within-year variability; mixed rain- and snow-fed border basin
properties.source_note: WECS River Basin Plan 2024, Mahakali Basin section
properties.caution: Catchment is 67% in India; WECS gives monsoon-share runoff rather than a full seasonal discharge split

properties.name: Karnali
properties.annual_discharge_or_runoff: 1,256 m3/s average annual discharge at Nepal-India border
properties.dry_season_note: Very low winter and pre-monsoon discharge despite large annual volume
properties.source_note: WECS River Basin Plan 2024, Karnali Basin section
properties.caution: Border aggregate masks major sub-basin variation

properties.name: Gandaki
properties.annual_discharge_or_runoff: 1,952 m3/s average annual discharge at Nepal-India border
properties.dry_season_note: March-April are the driest months; wet-season dominance despite snowmelt contribution
properties.source_note: WECS River Basin Plan 2024, Gandaki Basin section
properties.caution: Large internal contrast between wet southern slopes and rain-shadow northern sub-basins

properties.name: Koshi
properties.annual_discharge_or_runoff: 1,827 m3/s average annual discharge at Nepal-India border
properties.dry_season_note: Jan-Mar flows can fall to roughly one-tenth of August peak flows
properties.source_note: WECS River Basin Plan 2024, Koshi Basin section
properties.caution: Range reflects strong sub-basin heterogeneity and snow/glacier influence

properties.name: Babai
properties.annual_discharge_or_runoff: 79.9 m3/s average annual discharge at Nepal-India border
properties.dry_season_note: Dry flow is low and sustained mainly by local groundwater discharges
properties.source_note: WECS River Basin Plan 2024, Babai Basin section
properties.caution: Smaller medium basin; useful as seasonality comparator rather than national anchor

properties.name: West Rapti
properties.monsoon_metric: 73.5% of annual runoff in four monsoon months
properties.dry_season_note: Annual runoff exceeds total demand on paper, but dry-season water availability is insufficient for year-round irrigation
properties.source_note: WECS River Basin Plan 2024, West Rapti Basin section
properties.caution: Model-based runoff estimate rather than observed long-series discharge split
properties.location_basis: Named West Rapti / Rapti River anchor from Nominatim near Dang

properties.name: Kamala
properties.annual_discharge_or_runoff: Best available observed anchor in checked sources: 44.7 m3/s annual mean at Chisapani over 1956-1970
properties.winter_metric: About 2% of annual rainfall in winter
properties.dry_season_note: Dry-season water availability is currently insufficient to meet year-round irrigation demand
properties.source_note: WECS River Basin Plan 2024, Kamala Basin section; WECS/CSIRO Kamala strategy
properties.caution: No clean seasonal runoff decomposition in the checked main WECS plan; older observed-flow anchor

properties.name: Bagmati
properties.dry_season_note: Separate WECS Bagmati basin study exists, but no verified official seasonality table was extracted in this pass
properties.source_note: WECS River Basin Plan 2024 notes Bagmati handled under separate project
properties.caution: Deliberate gap; should not be backfilled with weak secondary estimates
